channel.title: git on Jens Rantil
channel.description: Recent content in git on Jens Rantil

item.title: GIT mirroring using Jenkins
item.description: For the past couple of weeks I’ve been annoyed by the high latency when connecting to Github over SSH. While the other GIT transports could be an option, I prefer to use keys to authenticate against Github. This got me thinking about setting up a local GIT mirror at our office. To keep my project future proof, I planned to make this a cron-job-ish project; every so often it would checkout all repositories for a certain organization.
